/usr/bin/c++ -DKOKKOS_DEPENDENCE CMakeFiles/KokkosKernels_lapack_openmp.dir/__/__/test_common/Test_Main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/KokkosKernels_lapack_openmp.dir/backends/Test_OpenMP_Lapack.cpp.o -o KokkosKernels_lapack_openmp  ../../libkokkoskernels.a ../../libkokkoskernels_gtest.a /usr/local/lib/libkokkoscontainers.a /usr/local/lib/libkokkosalgorithms.a /usr/local/lib/libkokkossimd.a /usr/local/lib/libkokkoscore.a /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/10/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.so -ldl
